message:
fix: move SetOnReload and StartWatching inside LoadConfig success block (#3363) (#3386)

SetOnReload and StartWatching were called on k8sClient even when LoadConfig()
returned an error, operating on a partially initialized client. Move both calls
inside the else branch so they only run after config loads successfully.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
